## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss workflow insights and process improvements for Sunbit, Airbyte, and Hamlet clients.](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sunbit content strategy shifting from SEO-focused to more educational/top-of-funnel approach](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Airbyte reducing keyword density requirements, focusing on LLM-friendly formatting](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Hamlet requires highly technical, specialized content needing multiple edit rounds](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)
  - [Atlas workflow improvements discussed, including custom artifacts and pipeline adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

## Topics

### Sunbit Content Strategy

  - [Shifting away from mentioning financing/offers to purely educational content](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Creating new company info and target audience in Atlas based on blog content, not core business](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Moving towards B2B content (e.g. tips for dental offices) requiring more depth](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Jason (client contact) handles publishing, minimal red tape](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

### Airbyte Content Adjustments

  - [Reducing SEO score requirement from 80 to 65, allowing focus on formatting and client priorities](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Shifting towards LLM-friendly content structure (clear H2s, bullet points, questions)](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic landing pages for industries, personas, and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Mario (client contact) encourages GrowthX to provide expert recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

### Hamlet Technical Content Challenges

  - [Highly specific terminology requirements causing multiple edit rounds](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)
  - [David hesitant to create workflows due to output quality concerns](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)
  - [Suggestion to use LLM to analyze edits and create detailed writing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=2447.0)
  - [Daryl has created custom artifacts/pipelines; collaboration needed to refine](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=2281.0)

### Atlas Workflow Improvements

  - [Style adaptation step to be deprecated (redundant with article draft)](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Creating custom artifacts (e.g. "Sunbit broad context") for different content types](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)
  - [Using brief's SEO metadata section to manually adjust keywords](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Exploring ways to incorporate learnings from manual edits into workflows](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to collaborate with Daryl on refining Hamlet workflows and artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
  - [Create comprehensive writing instructions for Hamlet using LLM analysis of edits](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=2447.0)
  - [Test new keyword input methods in Atlas (comma-separated vs. bullet list)](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
  - [Continue adjusting Airbyte content towards new LLM-friendly format](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Monitor Sunbit's transition to B2B content, ensure depth and actionability](https://fathom.video/share/m5JQAAssDajDKTdKbyvz-chVvx7J3vx_?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
